default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX to discuss ongoing content projects and explore new opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO articles approved; listicles deprioritized due to complexity and review requirements](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Integration guides progressing well (\~10-15/week); positive partner feedback](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [New opportunity: Exploring AI-generated code components for Webflow marketplace](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [API key for publishing needs renewal; team to follow up](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

## Topics

### SEO Content Strategy

  - [18 SEO-focused articles approved in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Listicles deprioritized due to competitive nature and extensive review requirements](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Focus on faster-to-produce, less competitive SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [\~75 pieces published so far; 15/week ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)

### Integration Guides

  - [10-15 guides completed weekly](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Colin comfortable with structure and behavior of guides](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Partners showing interest in authoring their own integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Awaiting Google Tag Manager implementation for analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)

### Webflow Cloud & Code Components

  - [Colin proposed new project: AI-generated code samples/templates for Webflow Cloud and Code Components](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Aim: Create hundreds of getting-started samples to inspire users and boost adoption](https://fathom.video/share/9PysbALrEDe_1rWkN4cCsf2sAyYqzu6Q?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
